<think>
Okay, the user is asking about recent benchmark flows aimed at reducing contamination in text-to-SQL evaluations. Let me look through the provided search results to find relevant information.

First, the first search result mentions a paper from February 2024 that compares Termite and Spider to propose a measure for data contamination. That's a key point. The second result is a GitHub project from March 2026 that integrates DIN-SQL and MMSQL methods, which might be part of the benchmark framework. The third result talks about the Bird Benchmark, comparing three organizations: Full-Information, SQL-Only, and DAIL. 

So, the answer should include these benchmarks. The paper from arXiv.org is important here. The GitHub project is also a benchmark framework. The Bird Benchmark's three methods are part of the evaluation approaches. I need to mention each of these, their contributions to reducing contamination, and the correct URLs. Make sure to format the answer as specified, with the citations using the actual URLs from the search results.
</think>

ANSWER: 최근 text-to-SQL 평가에서 contamination을 줄이기 위한 벤치마크 흐름은 다음과 같은 주요 접근 방식을 포함한다. 1) Termite와 Spider를 비교하여 데이터 오염을 측정하는 지표를 제안한 논문([1](https://arxiv.org/html/2402.08100v1)) 2) DIN-SQL과 MMSQL의 핵심 방법론을 융합한 text2sql_eval 프레임워크([2](https://github.com/wd48/text2sql_eval)) 3) Full-Information, SQL-Only Organization, DAIL Organization을 비교한 Bird Benchmark([3](https://delosycho.co.kr/bird-benchmark의-text-to-sql-논문-정리-1/)). 이들 기준은 데이터 오염을 줄이기 위한 평가 지표 개선과 평가 프레임워크 구축을 목표로 한다.  
CITATIONS: [https://arxiv.org/html/2402.08100v1, https://github.com/wd48/text2sql_eval, https://delosycho.co.kr/bird-benchmark의-text-to-sql-논문-정리-1/]

ANSWER: 2025년 기준 Django와 Flask가 여전히 인기 있으며, 2026년 기준 FastAPI가 고성능 비동기 처리와 AI 통합에 강점이 있는 것으로 나타났습니다. Django는 대규모 웹 애플리케이션에 적합하며, Flask는 유연성과 간결성으로 사랑받고 있습니다. FastAPI는 빠른 성능과 비동기 지원으로 최근 높은 관심을 받고 있습니다.  
CITATIONS: [https://blog.jetbrains.com/ko/pycharm/2025/10/the-most-popular-python-frameworks-and-libraries-in-2025/, https://devhandbook.co.kr/entry/PYTHON-백엔드-프레임워크-3종-비교-Django-FastAPI-Flask-중-최적의-선택을-하는-5가지-방법]

<think>
Okay, the user is asking about the trends and major changes in LLM evaluation benchmarks after 2025. Let me look at the provided search results to find relevant information.

First, the first source mentions that there's a new paradigm where LLMs are used as evaluators, which addresses the limitations of traditional methods. This is from the Deep Learning for NLP 2025 course. That's a key point for trends.

The second source talks about the Hugging Face guidebook, which includes technical aspects like tokenization and inference methods. This might relate to more detailed evaluation criteria or methods. However, the exact benchmarks mentioned here aren't clear, but it's part of the evaluation process.

The third source lists major LLMs like GPT-5.2, Claude 4.5, Gemini 3, and DeepSeek, along with benchmarks like SWE-bench and AIME. These are specific benchmarks used in 2025. The user is asking about 2025 onwards, so this is relevant.

Putting this together, the trends would include the shift to using LLMs as evaluators, more technical aspects in evaluation methods, and the use of specific benchmarks like SWE-bench and AIME. The major changes are the new evaluation paradigms and the integration of technical details in the evaluation process. The citations should be the URLs from the search results.
</think>

ANSWER: 2025년 이후 LLM 평가 벤치마크는 LLM을 평가자로 활용하는 새로운 패러다임을 도입하며 변화하고 있습니다. 이는 기존 평가 방법의 한계를 극복하기 위해 토큰화와 추론 방식 등 기술적 메커니즘을 고려한 평가 기준이 강조되고 있습니다. 주요 벤치마크로는 SWE-bench, AIME 등이 사용되며, Hugging Face가 공개한 가이드북에서는 평가 결과 해석을 위한 세부 기준이 제안되었습니다. 또한, GPT-5.2, Claude 4.5, Gemini 3, DeepSeek 등 주요 모델들이 이러한 벤치마크를 통해 성능을 측정하고 있습니다.  
CITATIONS: [https://deepnlp2025.jeju.ai/ko/week05/index.html, https://discuss.pytorch.kr/t/the-llm-evaluation-guidebook-hugging-face-llm/8385, https://jstechlog.com/posts/llm-landscape-2025/]
